summary: First-principles Schedule 1A review found eight blocking issues across the prior handoff and this live-tree refresh. All eight were patched in the plan: forked copied history now preserves stored writer_principal values, Task 8/9/10 red-green commands run the safety regressions they introduce, the static direct-writer guard has explicit fail-closed synthetic tests, shared conftests are committed before Task 7 imports them, rollback now stops on a dirty checkout before switching source refs, the standalone eval decode fixture raw chat_messages writer is included in the schema/current-writer cutover, and evals/lib/decode_tools.py is included in the sequence_no read-side ordering cutover. Remaining warnings are explicit operational boundaries: audit_access_log remains inert schema in 1A, SQLite locking is single-process only, and PostgreSQL operational proof is deferred to Schedule 1C.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: fork_session copied source-session rows with role-derived writer_principal defaults, fabricating audit metadata for copied history.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 14 now requires ChatMessageRecord.writer_principal hydration, copies msg.writer_principal for source rows, bans role-keyed fallback helpers, and adds fork tests for copied-row and admin_tool writer preservation.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: Task 8 red/green commands used -k reserve_sequence and skipped the SQLite race tests that prove lock safety.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 8 commands now include reserve_sequence_range plus same-session and file-backed SQLite concurrency tests, and call out false-green runs that omit them.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: Task 9 red/green commands ran only the _insert_chat_message happy path, skipping raw_content, lock-precondition, and parent-role negative tests.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 9 commands now run every insert_chat_message regression and require the negative tests for green.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: The mechanical direct-writer guard had no explicit fail-closed red/green acceptance command.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: The preflight gate now requires test_static_direct_writers.py to scan the live tree and reject synthetic unallowlisted chat-message writers, composition-state writers, and unlocked helper calls.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: Task 7 imported tests.unit.web.conftest from a clean checkout before the plan committed that conftest.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 1 now commits the shared unit/integration conftests before later tasks import _make_session, and Task 14 no longer stages those conftests as if they were still uncommitted.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: The rollback script restored a compatible source ref with git switch --detach but did not mechanically stop on a dirty checkout first.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 18 rollback now runs git status --porcelain, prints a short dirty status, and exits before switching refs when uncommitted changes are present.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: _insert_chat_message had a docstring lock precondition but no mechanical enforcement.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 9 keeps the no-lock regression and _assert_session_write_lock_held(..., caller="_insert_chat_message") in the helper snippet.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: The staging reset runbook archived/deleted only the main SQLite DB file, leaving WAL/SHM/journal sidecars out of the recreate and rollback unit.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 18 keeps DB_ARTIFACTS as the main DB plus -wal, -shm, and -journal sidecars for archive, deletion, preservation, and rollback.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: The live tree contains a standalone eval decode helper fixture that creates and writes chat_messages rows via raw sqlite3 SQL, but the reviewed direct-writer snapshot did not name it.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: The direct-writer inventory, raw-SQL guard wording, Task 14 touched-file list, targeted verification command, and atomic staging list now include tests/unit/evals/lib/test_decode_tools.py.

resolved_blocking_issues.issue: evals/lib/decode_tools.py reads chat_messages with raw SQL ordered by created_at, id, which would diverge from 1A's new sequence_no canonical ordering for same-timestamp rows.
resolved_blocking_issues.change: Task 14's read-side ordering section now includes evals/lib/decode_tools.py, widens the read-consumer grep to src/tests/evals raw SQL, requires ORDER BY sequence_no for rev-4 DBs, and adds an equal-created_at regression in tests/unit/evals/lib/test_decode_tools.py.

warnings.issue: audit_access_log lands as inert schema in a current-writer schedule.
warnings.recommendation: Keep 1A to schema only for audit_access_log; later writers must pass the privacy/retention gate already listed in Task 4.

warnings.issue: SQLite locking is process-local and assumes the current single-worker staging deployment shape.
warnings.recommendation: Re-check deploy/elspeth-web.service, WEB_CONCURRENCY, the app startup guard, and live process shape before staging deploy.

warnings.issue: PostgreSQL DDL/concurrency behavior is intentionally not operationally proven by 1A.
warnings.recommendation: Do not deploy 1A against PostgreSQL or claim PostgreSQL readiness until Schedule 1C proves schema bootstrap, advisory-lock behavior, testcontainer lane, and CI gating.

warnings.issue: save_composition_state and set_active_state keep broad IntegrityError retry loops after lock discipline makes normal version conflicts unreachable.
warnings.recommendation: Keep the plan's OQ follow-up to remove the belt-and-suspenders retry loops once 1A has staged.

verification: Reloaded the plan-review workflow and the four required Elspeth standards skills.
Ran filigree session-context before substantive review.
Read the Schedule 1A plan, current sidecar, live sessions protocol/service/routes/models/schema/app code, deploy service file, reset runbook, and current direct-writer grep output.
Patched the plan after the live direct-writer grep found tests/unit/evals/lib/test_decode_tools.py raw chat_messages inserts outside the named reviewed snapshot.
Patched the plan after the systems lens found evals/lib/decode_tools.py still ordering raw chat_messages reads by created_at, id instead of sequence_no.
Ran four parallel first-principles review lenses and synthesized their reports.
Patched the Schedule 1A markdown plan in place for every blocking issue found in this pass.
Validated the updated review sidecar JSON parses cleanly.
No implementation tests were run because this pass changed planning/review artifacts only.
required_next_steps: Keep the direct-writer inventory and static guard as merge gates.
Re-review Schedules 1B and 1C separately before execution.

supersedes.reason: This pass restarted the review from first principles and patched newly found blockers in the plan and sidecar.
